stemHtml: What is the reason for LOG-ON with CPDLC?

options.a: The logon function is a means of exchanging application information between an aircraft and a specific ATSU. It also provides flight data to that ATSU.
options.b: The aircraft identification provided when initiating the logon exactly matches the aircraft identification of the filed flight plan.
options.c: The logon function is a means of exchanging information between an aircraft and the Tower. It also provides flight data to that tower.
options.d: Under certain circumstances, it may be operationally desirable for an ATS unit to set up an ADSC connection without a preceding logon.
